avatar:
> `avatar:` Displays the avatar of a person, or your own. 
 > ✦ Aliases: `av`
flip:
> `flip:` Has a chance of returning either a /j or a /srs. 
 > ✦ Aliases: `f`
help:
> `help:` Opens the commands catalog of the bot with aliases. 
 > ✦ Aliases: `h`
invite:
> `invite:` Sends an invite link to invite the bot. 
 > ✦ Aliases: `inv`
math:
> `math:` Does a math operation. Note: glitchy. 
 > ✦ Aliases: `m`
ping:
> `ping:` Fetches your current ping with the bot server. 
 > ✦ Aliases: `p`
talk:
> `talk:` Returns a message given a user input. 
 > ✦ Aliases: `t`, `t /m`
